summary.zh: 让前后景以克制的速度差移动，建立轻量层次感。
summary.en: Move foreground and background at restrained relative speeds to create depth.

definition.zh: 滚动时背景与前景以不同速度移动，从而营造纵深感。
definition.en: Layers respond to the same scroll input at different displacement rates, creating apparent depth.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

purpose.zh: 用前后景的克制速度差建立层次，同时保持主体内容稳定可读。
purpose.en: Create depth with restrained foreground-background speed differences while keeping primary content stable.

frequency.zh: 适合低频头图和展示区；长页面重复使用会增加视觉负担。
frequency.en: Use sparingly in hero and showcase areas; repetition across long pages adds visual load.

trigger.zh: 由页面滚动持续驱动，运动幅度与容器可见区间绑定。
trigger.en: Drive from page scroll, binding travel to the container's visible range.

enterExit.zh: 进入视口前后保持连续位置，避免在观察阈值处突然启动。
enterExit.en: Maintain continuous position around viewport entry and avoid threshold-based jumps.

interruptibility.zh: 方向变化时直接跟随当前滚动位置，无需播放补偿动画。
interruptibility.en: Follow current scroll position directly when direction changes, with no catch-up animation.

gestureRules.zh: 不接管滚动手势；背景层设置 pointer-events 规则，避免遮挡内容操作。
gestureRules.en: Never capture scroll gestures, and set pointer-event rules so background layers do not block content.

reducedMotion.zh: 所有层固定在信息最清晰的位置，移除速度差。
reducedMotion.en: Fix every layer at its clearest informational position and remove differential movement.

reviewNotes.zh: 控制速度比，主体文字保持接近页面滚动速度。
reviewNotes.en: Keep text near the page's scroll speed.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查移动端地址栏变化不会放大位移。
reviewNotes.en: Test mobile browser chrome changes for exaggerated travel.
